title: 5 Utility Stocks to Buy to Stay Safe Amid Severe Volatility
text: We have narrowed our search to five utility stocks. These are XEL, WEC, ETR, PNM and ATO.

title: Entergy Corporation (ETR) CEO Leo Denault on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Entergy Corporation (ETR) CEO Leo Denault on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: Entergy (ETR) Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: Entergy's (ETR) Q4 adjusted earnings of 76 cents per share, which surpassed the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 8.6% and also improve 7% year over year.

title: Utility Stock Q4 Earnings to Watch on Feb 23: ETR, NI & More
text: Total Q4 earnings of Utility stocks are expected to drop 1.5% year over year on 10.5% higher revenues. ETR, NI, OGS, WTRG, CPK & AVA are set to release their quarterly figures on Feb 23

title: Entergy to report 2021 financial results on Feb. 23
text: NEW ORLEANS , Feb. 16, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Entergy will report its 2021 financial results before the market opens Wednesday, Feb. 23. Leo Denault, chairman and chief executive officer, Drew Marsh, executive vice president and chief financial officer, and company leaders invite you to listen to a live webcast discussion of Entergy's financial results at 10 a.m.
